name: Quidax
description: A leading African cryptocurrency exchange making it easy to buy, sell, and store Solana and other digital assets with local fiat.

name: Busha
description: Digital asset platform offering a seamless way to invest, spend, and manage crypto portfolios in Africa with deep Solana integration.

name: SurfCash
description: Next-generation crypto payment card and app allowing users to spend their Solana balances directly at local merchants.

name: Ribh Finance
description: Sharia-compliant DeFi protocol built on Solana, offering ethical yield generation and lending for the African Muslim population.

name: Airbillspay
description: Utility payment infrastructure allowing users to pay for airtime, electricity, and internet using Solana and stablecoins.

name: Verxio Protocol
description: Decentralized infrastructure layer for cross-border African trade, tokenizing invoices and providing liquidity on Solana.

name: Paj Cash
description: Fast and low-cost remittance platform leveraging Solana's high throughput to move money into and across Africa.

name: NectarFi
description: Yield aggregator and automated market maker specifically optimized for African stablecoin pairs on the Solana blockchain.

name: Paystack Crypto
description: Seamless fiat-to-crypto onramp for African businesses. Accept stablecoins instantly and settle in local fiat currency.

name: Yellow Card
description: The largest cryptocurrency exchange on the African continent, bringing Solana to the masses across 20+ countries.

name: Kotani Pay
description: USSD-based crypto wallet enabling unbanked populations to receive Solana remittances without smartphones or internet.

name: Fonbnk
description: Convert prepaid airtime into digital money and Solana tokens instantly, acting as a decentralized onramp.

name: Canza Finance
description: Open finance portal providing FX and DeFi services to African SMEs using Solana-based stablecoins.

name: Mazzuma
description: Mobile money payment system integrated with Solana for cross-border transactions and smart contract deployments.

name: Ejara
description: Investment platform allowing Francophone Africa to access tokenized assets and yield on the Solana network.

name: VALR
description: Leading South African crypto exchange providing deep liquidity for Solana and SPL tokens to institutional and retail clients.

name: Credix
description: Decentralized credit marketplace connecting institutional investors with FinTech lenders in emerging markets like Nigeria.

name: Cassava Network
description: Web3 rewards infrastructure for African creators and users, driving Solana adoption through loyalty programs.

name: Lazerpay
description: Crypto payment gateway for creators and businesses globally. (Historical/Rebuilding phase)

name: Bitmama
description: Highly secure crypto platform to buy, sell, and trade Solana. Offers virtual crypto cards for global spending.

name: Chipper Cash
description: Border-free money transfers across Africa with integrated crypto trading features including Solana.

name: Centrifuge Africa
description: Bringing real-world African assets on-chain. Financing local businesses through Solana-based liquidity pools.

name: Vibra
description: Social crypto app designed for African millennials to learn, trade, and earn Solana through community engagement.

name: Helicarrier
description: Building crypto infrastructure for Africa. Creators of BuyCoins and Sendcash, utilizing Solana for fast settlement.

name: Zone
description: Regulated blockchain network that enables payments and acceptance of digital currencies for licensed financial institutions.
